title: pew pew totem
description: A really simple texture pack that changes the sound that plays when your totem pops into a simple "pew pew" sound, very whilst playing crystal pvp!
body:
# Pew Pew Totem

This texturepack replaces the casual standard totem popping sound from the totem of undying item with a more funny "pew pew" sound. This texturepack can be used in combination with any other texturepack that changes the behaviour of the totem of undying.

> Showcase https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZHGDnbkK_DY
